summary: Completed testing of MovimientosProduccion server-side pagination refactoring. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend testing verified MovimientosProduccion page loads fast with '50 de 3422 movimientos', Modelos page shows '50 de 1161', Registros page shows '50 de 174 registros', and RegistroForm loads correctly with Modelo combobox and estado validation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MovimientosProduccion refactoring complete. Backend tests cover: GET /api/movimientos-produccion with pagination (limit/offset), JOIN fields (servicio_nombre, persona_nombre, registro_n_corte), all=true returns array for RegistroForm, filter by servicio_id, search across corte/servicio/persona, performance test (3422 records in <5s), offset pagination. Frontend verified: MovimientosProduccion page shows '50 de 3422 movimientos' with filters (search, servicio, persona, fecha), Modelos page shows '50 de 1161' with filters, Registros page shows '50 de 174 registros', RegistroForm loads with Modelo combobox and estado validation warnings.

backend_movimientos_join_fields.details: Response includes servicio_nombre, persona_nombre, registro_n_corte from JOINs (eliminates N+1)

backend_movimientos_all_true.details: GET /api/movimientos-produccion?all=true&registro_id=X returns plain array for RegistroForm

backend_movimientos_search.details: GET /api/movimientos-produccion?search=X searches across corte, servicio, persona

backend_movimientos_performance.details: 3422 records handled in <5 seconds (was timing out before refactoring)

backend_movimientos_offset.details: Offset pagination returns different items on different pages

backend_modelos_still_works.details: GET /api/modelos pagination, all=true, and filtros still work after file rewrite

backend_registro_form_movimientos.details: RegistroForm uses ?all=true&registro_id=X to load movimientos correctly

frontend_movimientos_pagination.details: Shows '50 de 3422 movimientos' with 'Cargar mas' button

frontend_movimientos_filters.details: Search, Servicio, Persona, Fecha Desde, Fecha Hasta filters present and functional

frontend_modelos_pagination.details: Shows '50 de 1161' with 'Cargar mas' button and filter dropdowns

frontend_registro_form.details: RegistroForm loads with Modelo combobox, estado selector, and validation warnings
